title: vandellia nervosa
intro: Vandellia nervosa, also known as "Tongue Depressor Vine" or "Mandak, is a climbing plant native to the tropical forests of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Vandellia nervosa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste for topical application, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various ailments.
